forbidden_changes: do not add global survival bonus without progress gating
do not only scale all coefficients
do not treat partial_progress as success_like
required_changes: Redesign low_alt_stability to reward stable low-altitude approach only when near the pad and properly oriented, not just low altitude
Restructure terminal_penalty to penalize severe crashes more than near-landing failures, or convert to a terminal progress bonus to better align with partial_progress
Preserve early_approach, leg_bonus, and terminal_bonus components
Ensure net reward on partial_progress trajectories is higher than on low_progress_survival
Avoid aggressive penalization that over-penalizes partial_progress trajectories

expected_effect: Separate progress, stability, and terminal terms based on analyzer intent.
risk: Delta terms may be noisy if the progress proxy is imperfect.
